title: T-048 — scanner mobile evidence and route label closeout harness
prompt:
# T-048 — scanner mobile evidence and route label closeout harness

PRD: docs/prd/06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §6 D1, §8.8 UI Surfaces Traceability Matrix
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the shared scanner UI closeout harness for 390x844 screenshots, traces, and route-to-prototype label evidence.

## Implementation contract
Add Playwright project profile for viewport 390x844, shared screenshot naming convention, route-label smoke list covering canonical scanner-prefixed labels and first-class done, PIN, and camera labels, plus CI artifact retention notes.

## Files
- apps/scanner/e2e/scanner-label-smoke.spec.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/playwright.config.ts [modify]
- docs/testing/scanner-mobile-evidence.md [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the scanner UI is implemented, when compared with `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:7-136` at mobile viewport 390x844, then it preserves structural, visual, and interaction parity, captures screenshot and Playwright trace artifacts, and documents intentional divergence from PRD/UX
2. Given the route is loaded at 390x844, when the primary happy path is completed, then the first-class done screen label is reachable and uses the shared scanner SuccessScreen pattern
3. Given API validation returns block or warn severity, when the screen receives it, then the correct full-screen block or amber reason-code pattern is rendered
4. Given closeout runs, when artifacts are reviewed, then screenshot filenames include the canonical prototype label and task id

## Test strategy
- RED: write Playwright or component tests against the 390x844 route before implementation
- Run pnpm --filter scanner test and pnpm --filter scanner e2e --project=scanner-mobile

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement server contracts in this UI task
- Do not skip mobile screenshot or Playwright trace closeout
- Do not silently diverge from the referenced prototype label
